hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】油价触及四年高位，比特币跌向 75,000 美元，ETH、SOL、XRP 下跌；【CRYPTO】哎哟。美国30年期国债收益率刚刚触及5%，比特币或将付出代价；【CRYPTO】Ark Invest 购买了价值 3900 万美元的 Robinhood 股票，并出售了价值 600 万美元的现货比特币 ETF。

items.title: Bitcoin slides toward $75,000, ETH, SOL, XRP drop as oil hits four-year high
items.summary: Crypto sold off across the board with bitcoin down 2.1% and ether off 3.4% as Brent crude surged 7.1% to $126 a barrel on reports President Trump is being briefed on military options for Iran.
items.title_zh: 油价触及四年高位，比特币跌向 75,000 美元，ETH、SOL、XRP 下跌
items.summary_zh: 加密货币全线遭到抛售，比特币下跌 2.1%，以太坊下跌 3.4%，而布伦特原油价格飙升 7.1%，至每桶 126 美元，有报道称特朗普总统正在听取有关伊朗军事选项的简报。

items.title: Ouch. The U.S. 30-year Treasury yield just hit 5% and bitcoin may pay the price
items.summary: Hawkish dissent within the Federal Reserve, elevated oil prices and rising long-term inflation expectations are pushing bond yields higher.
items.title_zh: 哎哟。美国30年期国债收益率刚刚触及5%，比特币或将付出代价
items.summary_zh: 美联储内部的鹰派异议、油价上涨和长期通胀预期上升正在推高债券收益率。

items.title: Ark Invest buys $39 million worth of Robinhood shares, offloads $6 million of its own spot bitcoin ETF
items.summary: Robinhood's stock closed down 13.2% after the company reported weaker first-quarter earnings the previous day.
items.title_zh: Ark Invest 购买了价值 3900 万美元的 Robinhood 股票，并出售了价值 600 万美元的现货比特币 ETF
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 前一天公布第一季度盈利疲软后，该公司股价收盘下跌 13.2%。

items.title: Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its latest decision on interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率稳定，但反对声音达到1992年以来最高水平
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了最新的利率决定。

items.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial races toward 62 billion token unlock with near-unanimous vote
items.summary: Proposal introduces vesting for 40.7 billion insider tokens after 2-year cliff, even as voting power remains concentrated among a handful of large holders
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的 World Liberty Financial 以近乎一致的投票结果竞相解锁 620 亿枚代币
items.summary_zh: 尽管投票权仍然集中在少数大股东手中，但该提案在两年悬崖后引入了 407 亿枚内部代币的归属

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: The Green Beret was just the start: New data suggests military insider trading crisis on Polymarket
items.summary: New data shows unusually high win rates in defense bets, building on research that 3% of traders drive prices and under 1% capture most profits.
items.title_zh: 绿色贝雷帽只是开始：新数据表明 Polymarket 出现军事内幕交易危机
items.summary_zh: 新数据显示，国防赌注的胜率异常高，研究表明 3% 的交易者推动价格，而不到 1% 的交易者获取大部分利润。

items.title: Bitcoin faces $80,000 resistance as derivatives shows signs of risk aversion
items.summary: Bitcoin faces profit-taking pressure near $80,000, backed up by a U.S. inflation report that comes as high oil prices and rising bond yields weigh on risk assets.
items.title_zh: 衍生品出现避险迹象，比特币面临8万美元阻力
items.summary_zh: 在美国通胀报告的支撑下，比特币面临接近 80,000 美元的获利了结压力，而该报告的背景是高油价和不断上升的债券收益率给风险资产带来压力。

items.title: Dogecoin zooms 10%, breaking away from bitcoin as open interest hits a yearly peak
items.summary: Open interest in DOGE-tracked futures climbed to 15.36 billion tokens, a sign that traders are adding fresh leverage as the memecoin’s price surges.
items.title_zh: 随着未平仓合约达到年度峰值，狗狗币暴涨 10%，脱离比特币
items.summary_zh: DOGE 追踪的期货未平仓合约攀升至 153.6 亿个代币，这表明随着 memecoin 价格飙升，交易者正在增加新的杠杆。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented'
items.summary: Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.
items.title_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，他将继续担任美联储理事，称特朗普的批评“史无前例”
items.summary_zh: 鲍威尔谈到了在主席任期结束后是否继续担任理事会成员的问题。

items.title: PayPal's new CEO makes Venmo a standalone business unit as potential buyers circle
items.summary: PayPal is betting that a new corporate structure can reignite growth at a company that has lost ground to Apple, Google and Stripe in the e-commerce battle.
items.title_zh: 随着潜在买家的青睐，PayPal 新任首席执行官将 Venmo 打造为独立业务部门
items.summary_zh: PayPal 认为，新的公司结构可以重新激发这家在电子商务之战中输给苹果、谷歌和 Stripe 的公司的增长。

items.title: Here's what changed in the new Fed statement
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in March.
items.title_zh: 这是新的美联储声明中的变化
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 3 月份上一次决策会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Traders brace for $800 billion in earnings-related stock movement
items.summary: Wenesday night is the main event for earnings season, with Alphabet, Amazon, Meta and Microsoft – four of the "Magnificent Seven" — set to report.
items.title_zh: 交易员准备迎接与收益相关的 8000 亿美元的股票走势
items.summary_zh: 周三晚上是财报季的重头戏，Alphabet、亚马逊、Meta 和微软——“七巨头”中的四家——将公布财报。

items.title: Kalshi bettors called it: Powell says he will stay on as Fed governor after chair term ends
items.summary: Bettors on the platform don't think Powell will leave until August. If he stays on until then, he'd attend two more meetings of the FOMC.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希投注者称：鲍威尔表示，他将在主席任期结束后继续担任美联储理事
items.summary_zh: 该平台上的投注者认为鲍威尔要到八月才会离开。如果他留任到那时，他将再参加两次联邦公开市场委员会会议。

items.title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square USA fund falls sharply in public market debut
items.summary: The listing gives public investors their first direct stake in Ackman's investment platform, which runs a concentrated portfolio of 10 large-cap names.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场美国基金在公开市场首次亮相时大幅下跌
items.summary_zh: 此次上市让公众投资者首次直接持有阿克曼投资平台的股份，该平台运营着由 10 家大盘股组成的集中投资组合。

items.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
items.summary: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将听取有关伊朗新选择的简报后油价触及2022年以来最高
items.summary_zh: Axios报道称，美国中央司令部已准备好对伊朗进行一波“短暂而有力”的打击的计划。

items.title: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, after Merz criticises war
items.summary: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.
items.title_zh: 默茨批评战争后，特朗普表示美国正在研究削减驻德部队
items.summary_zh: 在他发表上述言论之前，德国总理批评了美国对伊朗战争的态度。

items.title: Jewish agency warned of 'high' threat level ahead of Bondi shooting, report finds
items.summary: Gun reforms should be prioritised and policing around Jewish events increased, royal commission says.
items.title_zh: 报告发现，犹太机构在邦迪枪击事件前发出“高”威胁级别警告
items.summary_zh: 皇家委员会表示，应优先考虑枪支改革，并加强对犹太事件的监管。

items.title: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns
items.summary: Drone users will also be required to register their devices and secure permits before flying them.
items.title_zh: 中国以安全考虑为由禁止在北京销售无人机
items.summary_zh: 无人机用户还需要在飞行前注册其设备并获得许可。

items.title: Attacks on Jewish Targets in Europe Suggest Hybrid Warfare
items.summary: Officials are investigating similar attacks across Europe, all claimed by a shadowy Islamist group that may be using low-cost, unsophisticated methods to sow fear in Jewish communities.
items.title_zh: 对欧洲犹太目标的袭击表明混合战争
items.summary_zh: 官员们正在调查欧洲各地发生的类似袭击事件，所有袭击均由一个神秘的伊斯兰组织负责，该组织可能正在使用低成本、简单的方法在犹太社区散布恐惧。

items.title: Police in Australia Were Warned of Terror Risk Before Bondi Attack, Report Says
items.summary: A Jewish security group told police an attack on the community was “likely” because of heightened antisemitism, days before December’s mass shooting in Sydney.
items.title_zh: 报告称，邦迪袭击前澳大利亚警方收到恐怖风险警告
items.summary_zh: 一个犹太安全组织告诉警方，在 12 月悉尼大规模枪击事件发生前几天，反犹太主义情绪高涨，该社区“很可能”遭到袭击。

items.title: How the War in Iran is Affecting Africa’s Economy and Fuel Supply
items.summary: Despite the fragile cease-fire in the Middle East, many Africans say they are bracing for tougher times ahead and making difficult decisions about the future.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何影响非洲的经济和燃料供应
items.summary_zh: 尽管中东停火协议脆弱，但许多非洲人表示，他们正在为未来的艰难时期做好准备，并对未来做出艰难的决定。

items.title: XO Market bets on user-generated prediction markets to rival Polymarket and Kalshi
items.summary: Backed by 20VC, Picus Capital and Coinbase Ventures; XO lets users create and profit from their own prediction markets, and plans to rollout a new vault product to democratize market making.
items.title_zh: XO Market 押注于用户生成的预测市场，与 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 竞争
items.summary_zh: 获得 20VC、Picus Capital 和 Coinbase Ventures 的支持； XO 让用户创建自己的预测市场并从中获利，并计划推出新的金库产品以使做市民主化。

items.title: SWEAT protocol thwarts multi-million dollar exploit, restores user balances
items.summary: Blockaid estimates the attacker stole roughly 13.71 billion SWEAT, about 65% of the total supply, worth about $3.5 million at the time.
items.title_zh: SWEAT 协议阻止了数百万美元的攻击，恢复了用户余额
items.summary_zh: Blockaid 估计攻击者窃取了大约 137.1 亿个 SWEAT，约占总供应量的 65%，当时价值约 350 万美元。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: Seasonal trends favor bulls even as bitcoin ends April in a defensive mood
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for April 30, 2026
items.title_zh: 尽管比特币在四月结束时处于防御情绪，但季节性趋势仍然有利于多头
items.summary_zh: 您对 2026 年 4 月 30 日的展望

items.title: Wasabi Protocol hit by more than $5 million exploit across multiple chains, security firms say
items.summary: Blockaid and CertiK said a compromised admin key was used to upgrade Wasabi Protocol contracts and drain funds.
items.title_zh: 安全公司表示，芥末协议在多个链上遭受了超过 500 万美元的攻击
items.summary_zh: Blockaid 和 CertiK 表示，受损的管理密钥被用来升级 Wasabi 协议合约并耗尽资金。

items.title: Twenty One Capital shares rise as Tether pushes merger with Strike, Elektron
items.summary: Tether has proposed that Twenty One Capital, a NYSE-listed bitcoin treasury venture, merge with Strike and Elektron Energy.
items.title_zh: Tether 推动与 Strike、Elektron 合并，二十一资本 (Twenty One Capital) 股价上涨
items.summary_zh: Tether 提议将在纽约证券交易所上市的比特币金库公司 Twenty One Capital 与 Strike 和 Elektron Energy 合并。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.title_zh: 我们对社区安全的承诺
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过模型保障、误用检测、策略执行以及与安全专家的协作来保护 ChatGPT 中的社区安全。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”

items.title: Here's why surging oil prices may not derail the consumer trade

items.title: Wasabi Protocol drained of $4.5 million in apparent admin key compromise
items.summary: The exploit used a playbook similar to Drift's $285 million breach earlier this month: a compromised deployer key with no timelock or multisig that drained funds.
